bg job, reasoning_effort=medium

span.p:
cluster_findings
key file + line overlap + category

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
resolve_severity
unique S = single severity
critical in S = critical + DEBATE
else = max S + DEBATE

span.p:
prepare
filter targets by mode
disagreement = DEBATE only
both = + CONSENSUS

span.p:
merge
apply_verdicts per cluster
action: agree, revise, withdraw

span.p:
recompute Q-A severity
DEBATE_RESOLVED
DEBATE_PERSISTED
CONSENSUS_CONFIRMED
REVISED

span.p:
CODE-REVIEW.md final
Round 2 annotated if applied
